questions.question: Why does the author say Jesus had to be made like his brothers in every way?
options: To become a merciful and faithful high priest
questions.correct: To become a merciful and faithful high priest
questions.feedback: Jesus was made like his brothers to become a merciful and faithful high priest.

questions.question: Through death Jesus destroyed the one who holds the power of death. Who is that?
questions.feedback: Through death Jesus destroyed the devil who holds the power of death.

questions.question: The author says Jesus helps angels rather than Abraham's descendants.
questions.feedback: Jesus helps the offspring of Abraham, not angels.

questions.question: The author warns that we must pay more careful _____ to what we have heard so we do not drift away.
questions.feedback: Pay careful attention so that we do not drift away from the message.

questions.question: Jesus is not ashamed to call believers his _____.
questions.feedback: Jesus is not ashamed to call them brothers.
